title: 🧠 CoTabor AI Settings
subtitle: Manage AI memory backends and external tool integrations

language.label: Language
language.description: Switch the plugin UI and Agent output language

llm.title: Global LLM Configuration
llm.description: Configure your OpenAI-compatible endpoint for CoTabor's planner and executor. Leave blank to use default environment variable settings.

docLogger.title: Run Log Documents
docLogger.description: When enabled, automatically creates a run log document in Feishu or Notion for each Agent run, recording LLM conversations, execution steps, and page screenshots. Requires a storage backend configured first.
docLogger.label: Save run log documents
docLogger.detail: Saves the complete execution record (LLM I/O, audit results, page screenshots) to Feishu or Notion. Disabled by default.

debug.title: Sidebar Debugging
debug.description: Agent technical logs are hidden by default to keep the UI clean. Enable to view technical logs in the sidebar for workflow debugging.
debug.label: Show debug logs
debug.detail: When enabled, the sidebar shows underlying Agent technical logs. When disabled, only chat results and the workflow overview are shown.
